## 🚀 Add AI Notes + Next Action Suggestion Engine (LeadFlow CRM)

### 🎯 Objective

Enhance the existing Lead Management System by adding:

1. **AI Auto-Generated Notes**
2. **Next Action Suggestion Engine (Rule + AI Hybrid)**

This should integrate seamlessly into the **Lead Details Page**.

---

# ✅ FEATURE 1: AI AUTO-GENERATED NOTES

## 🧠 What to Build

* Generate professional notes using OpenAI
* Auto-trigger on:

  * Lead creation
  * Stage/status update
  * Manual "Generate Notes" button

---

## ⚙️ Backend (Supabase / API)

### Add fields to `leads` table:

```sql
ai_notes text,
next_actions text[],
last_ai_generated_at timestamp
```

---

### Create API Function: `generateLeadNotes`

```ts
import OpenAI from "openai";

export async function generateLeadNotes(lead) {
  const openai = new OpenAI({
    apiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY,
  });

  const prompt = `
You are a CRM assistant.

Generate professional sales notes for this lead:

Lead Name: ${lead.name}
Company: ${lead.company}
Service: ${lead.service}
Deal Value: ₹${lead.value}
Stage: ${lead.stage}
Status: ${lead.status}
Lead Type: ${lead.type}

Return in this format:

Initial Context:
<short summary>

Next Steps:
- bullet points
`;

  const response = await openai.chat.completions.create({
    model: "gpt-4o-mini",
    messages: [{ role: "user", content: prompt }],
  });

  return response.choices[0].message.content;
}
```

---

### Save to DB

```ts
await supabase
  .from("leads")
  .update({
    ai_notes: notes,
    last_ai_generated_at: new Date(),
  })
  .eq("id", lead.id);
```

---

# ✅ FEATURE 2: NEXT ACTION SUGGESTION ENGINE

## 🧠 Rule-Based Engine

```ts
export function getNextActions(stage) {
  switch (stage) {
    case "Lead Initiation":
      return [
        "Call the lead",
        "Verify contact details",
        "Assign lead owner",
      ];

    case "Qualification & Analysis":
      return [
        "Schedule requirement meeting",
        "Identify decision maker",
        "Assess budget",
      ];

    case "Proposal & Negotiation":
      return [
        "Send proposal",
        "Follow up in 2 days",
        "Handle objections",
      ];

    case "Closure":
      return [
        "Confirm deal outcome",
        "Send agreement",
        "Capture feedback",
      ];

    default:
      return [];
  }
}
```

---

### Save Next Actions

```ts
const actions = getNextActions(lead.stage);

await supabase
  .from("leads")
  .update({
    next_actions: actions,
  })
  .eq("id", lead.id);
```

---

# 🎨 FRONTEND IMPLEMENTATION (React + Tailwind)

## 📍 Add Section in Lead Details Page

---

## 🔹 AI Notes Section

```tsx
<div className="mt-6 bg-[#0B0F19] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4">
  <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-3">
    <h3 className="text-white font-semibold">AI Generated Notes</h3>
    <button
      onClick={handleGenerateNotes}
      className="text-sm text-teal-400 hover:text-teal-300"
    >
      Regenerate
    </button>
  </div>

  <pre className="text-gray-300 whitespace-pre-wrap">
    {lead.ai_notes || "No notes generated yet."}
  </pre>
</div>
```

---

## 🔹 Next Actions Section

```tsx
<div className="mt-4 bg-[#0B0F19] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4">
  <h3 className="text-white font-semibold mb-3">Suggested Actions</h3>

  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
    {lead.next_actions?.map((action, index) => (
      <button
        key={index}
        className="px-3 py-1 bg-teal-500/10 border border-teal-500/30 text-teal-400 rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-teal-500/20"
      >
        {action}
      </button>
    ))}
  </div>
</div>
```

---

# ⚡ ACTION HANDLER

```ts
const handleGenerateNotes = async () => {
  const res = await fetch("/api/generate-notes", {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify({ lead }),
  });

  const data = await res.json();

  updateLead(data);
};
```

---

# 🔄 AUTO TRIGGERS

Trigger AI when:

* Lead is created
* Stage changes

```ts
useEffect(() => {
  if (lead.stage) {
    generateNotes();
  }
}, [lead.stage]);
```

---

# 🚀 EXPECTED RESULT

* AI automatically writes **professional sales notes**
* System suggests **next actions dynamically**
* Improves:

  * Productivity
  * Conversion rate
  * CRM intelligence

---

# 🔥 BONUS (OPTIONAL)

* Add **“Create Task” button** from suggested actions
* Add **Lead Score (AI-based)**
* Add **Follow-up reminders**

---

# 📌 FINAL INSTRUCTION

Implement this feature cleanly and ensure:

* No UI breaking
* Dark theme consistency
* Fast API response handling
* Error handling for AI failures

---

This should feel like a **premium AI-powered CRM (HubSpot level)**.
